---
name: 'FOL Axiomatization bug or question '
about: 'To report bugs, questions, or comments involving the common logic  axiomatization. '
title: ''
labels: FOL/CLIF
assignees: alanruttenberg

---

Explain the bug or issue. Ideally provide a test case. Best tests are either proofs that should succeed or models that are unsatisfiable. So, if possible, try to construct a test case that illustrates the issue in that form.

List axiom tags involved, e.g dok-1 ("If a continuant-part-of b then if a is an instance of material-entity then b is an instance of material-entity")

Remember to put \`\`\` on the line before and after any formula so that it keeps its indentation.

You may delete these instructions.
